name: material-transformation
purpose: Given a material state and a driver input, traverse the Material State Space to infer the resulting transition cascade and property changes — predictions, never facts.

transformation.statement: Material State + Driver input -> inferred transition cascade (predicted states + property changes), each step provenance-bound

consumes.name: initialState
consumes.description: Where the material starts, e.g. { material: 'epoxy', state: 'glassy' } or a state id.

consumes.name: driver
consumes.description: The applied driver, e.g. { driver: 'temperature', magnitude: 800, unit: '°C' }. The engine infers, it does not search '800 degrees'.

produces.name: cascade
produces.description: The inferred sequence of transitions. EVERY step carries its source transition's provenance, mechanism, confidence and resulting property changes; the cascade is a hypothesis (epistemicStatus locked), and cascade confidence is the weakest link along the path.

epistemicStatus.description: Hard-locked: an inferred cascade is a prediction, never a fact.

confidence.description: Weakest-link (min) of the traversed transition confidences.

provenance.description: Evidence for THIS transition (from the State Space edge).

missingEvidence.description: Steps with weak/absent evidence — feeds Knowledge Gap / Experiment Planner.

reasoning.evidenceModel: cascade confidence = min over traversed transition confidences (weakest link); each transition's confidence comes from its State Space evidence.
reasoning.notes: This is inference over the Material State Space, NOT retrieval. '800°C on epoxy' becomes a traversal (glassy → rubbery → degradation → char), not a search for '800 degrees'. Predictions are unvalidated hypotheses; uncertainty is exposed per step.

confidence.notes: Per-step and cascade-level. A path through low-confidence transitions yields low cascade confidence, never a confident guess.

cost.notes: Graph traversal over the Material State Space from the initial state under the driver. Cost scales with reachable path length.

dependencies.name: Material Behavior Model (material-state/v1.1)
dependencies.notes: The world model it traverses (validated by the MBM Ontology Validation Suite). Does NOT exist yet — the layer this engine sits on.

dependencies.name: IKL mechanisms
dependencies.notes: Links each transition to its mechanism.

failureModes.condition: initial state not present in the State Space
failureModes.result: rejected — cannot start a traversal from an unknown state

failureModes.condition: no known transition from this state under this driver
failureModes.result: empty cascade + terminatedReason=no_further_transition — this is the FSCTM breakdown trigger (a gap, not a failure), fed to Innovation Space

failureModes.condition: transitions exist but with weak/absent evidence
failureModes.result: low-confidence cascade with missingEvidence populated — uncertainty exposed, never hidden

provenance.notes: Each cascade step cites the State Space edge's evidence; a step without provenance is structurally impossible (required in the produces schema).
